content.problemStatement:
Chef has bought a new robot, which will be used for delivering dishes to his customers. He started testing the robot by letting it move on a line.

Initially, the robot is placed at the coordinate x=Xx = Xx=X. Then, it should execute a sequence of NNN commands, described by a string SSS with length NNN. Each character of this string is either 'L' or 'R', denoting that the robot should walk one step to the left (decreasing xxx by 111) or to the right (increasing xxx by 111), respectively.

How many distinct points are visited by the robot when it has executed all the commands? A point ppp is visited by the robot if ppp is an integer and the robot's position before or after executing some command is x=px = px=p.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and XXX.
The second line contains a single string SSS with length NNN.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ‚Äē the number of points visited by the robot.
